# Particles
A lightweight particle field for ambient motion and hover depth.
## Import
```tsx
import { Particles } from "@/components/ui/particles";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Particles quantity={60} speed={0.45} color="#a855f7" number={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **quantity** (number) — default: `60`: Quantity
- **speed** (number) — default: `0.45`: Speed
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color
- **number** (number): Count
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add particles
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/particles
```
